title: the did that just happen thread
display_title: the did that just happen thread
wikitext:
[]: the "did that just happen?" thread             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Apr 26, 2005 10:39 am this is a thread for everyone to post a concern on something they are sure they saw and yet are not....*cough* as an example and as the first concern, here's mine: eoe, whilst we're seeing what's in Shinji's mind there's a scene were i'm sure you see a 'memory' of Asuka, naked on top of Shinji, naked. without going into unnecasery detail lets just say there was no need to spank the monkey for Shinji any more- he was getting the real thing. i just need to know i'm not loosing it.....well, concerning this anyway. see? have a go yourself. - ice reaper

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 26, 2005 12:41 pm That wasn't a 'memory' -- it was a 'visual metaphor' for the fact that Shinji and Asuka's minds had become connected. Well, says Shin-seiki, anyway, but he's usually right about these things.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Apr 26, 2005 1:31 pm well, i suppose it makes sense, that sort of thing happens a lot in this magnificent existence known as evangelion. *sigh*

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Tue Apr 26, 2005 2:37 pm If I know what you are referring to it is as Reichu said--a symbol that Shinji has accepted instrumentality and his mind and soul has merged with all others, including Asuka (in fact, I think the scene you are talking about is Rei, Asuka, and Misato taking turns saying "do you want to become one with me?"--WAIT, I just went back and scanned through EoE--I have no idea what you are referring to--are you confusing Rei and Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 26, 2005 2:53 pm bp32 wrote: WAIT, I just went back and scanned through EoE--I have no idea what you are referring to--are you confusing Rei and Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Apr 26, 2005 4:41 pm Funny how the greatest film ever could easily pass for a porno flick.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Tue Apr 26, 2005 5:03 pm Mr. Tines wrote: bp32 wrote: WAIT, I just went back and scanned through EoE--I have no idea what you are referring to--are you confusing Rei and Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 26, 2005 6:51 pm Although EoE briefly recycles the #20 "Do you want to become one with me?" animation, for a single cut. (It's shortly before the kitchen sequence.)

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Tue Apr 26, 2005 7:09 pm Reichu wrote: Although EoE briefly recycles the #20 "Do you want to become one with me?" animation, for a single cut. (It's shortly before the kitchen sequence.)

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Apr 26, 2005 9:34 pm Reichu wrote: That wasn't a 'memory' -- it was a 'visual metaphor' for the fact that Shinji and Asuka's minds had become connected. Well, says Shin-seiki, anyway, but he's usually right about these things.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 26, 2005 9:46 pm Maybe it means nothing deeper than the fact that Shinji likes to be on the bottom. Just kidding.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Apr 26, 2005 9:54 pm With Asuka involved did you think it be anyother way ? :P

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 26, 2005 9:54 pm DatDude wrote: With Asuka involved did you think it be anyother way ? :P

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Apr 26, 2005 9:57 pm Theirs a reason she need to be cahined up half the time you know :P I man henti what is this henti you speak of I have never heard the word before. :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 26, 2005 10:08 pm I don't know what this "henti" you speak of is, either.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Apr 26, 2005 10:14 pm Reichu wrote: Maybe it means nothing deeper than the fact that Shinji likes to be on the bottom. Just kidding.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Apr 26, 2005 10:47 pm If every ones minds were joining into one didn't it take place in every ones heads ? :P

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Apr 26, 2005 10:57 pm DatDude wrote: If every ones minds were joining into one didn't it take place in every ones heads ? :P

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Apr 27, 2005 12:24 am Shin-seiki wrote: DatDude wrote: If every ones minds were joining into one didn't it take place in every ones heads ? :P

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 27, 2005 2:52 am Wrong thread, DD.
